creator: wa5qjh@xmission.com
text:
Attempting to download FreeBSD-12.3 ( or ANY RELEASE for any architect  ) in Philippines from mirror in Malaysia fails for incorrect or missing certificate. This has been a recurring problem for at least several months when downloading either for amd64 or the arm64 images that I've tried.
 notes:
downloading on an Rpi 3B in Release 12.2 in a country with some of the sorriest internet from a rural area with speeds <1/20 national average (55kb/s at the moment), to be run on an hp laptop with the bios or os corrupted. (just so you understand the odd combination).
This is my first bug report since I began using FreeBSD around 1993.

Here is where I was told to report the problem by @freebsdhelp on twitter.
